results.title: Context-aware Mac keypad to automate workflows + meetings - Dune | Product Hunt
results.content: a PR on github, checking limits on Claude etc. On context triggers- You can customize your actions to be triggered based on the Active Window, Calendar events and Time of the day and you could also choose which Apps could overpower an active window - for example, if you're in a zoom meeting, the 3 buttons will function as meeting control buttons and a new active window in the foreground won't affect these functions. So as soon as you set it up, you can start using Dune and the actions will [...] Dune is a context Aware Keypad for mac that reads which app is in the foreground and automatically changes what its 3 keys do based on what you're doing. Dune is context-aware, meaning, its keys update automatically based on the app you are running. A three-key Mac keypad that reads your active app and surfaces the right actions automatically, whether you're coding, in a meeting, or getting things done. results.title: Context-aware Mac keypad to automate workflows + meetings - Dune | Product Hunt
results.content: Combining this with custom agents and tools people already use could make it even more powerful - for example an Email agent built on Openclaw/Claude that surfaces your most important emails at the start of the day, an agent that triggers after the meeting listing the most important points covered in the meeting and much more. Additionally, because of Agentic workflows being a thing now, a single button becomes much more powerful, and Dune is specially designed for connecting custom scripts and [...] custom scripts and agents without having a complex flowchart like Interface to build new actions. Examples of more complex triggers that come pre-loaded with Dune include- Joining a meeting, Raising/Merging a PR on github, checking limits on Claude etc. On context triggers- You can customize your actions to be triggered based on the Active Window, Calendar events and Time of the day and you could also choose which Apps could overpower an active window - for example, if you're in a zoom meeting, [...] The Dune configuration tool also lets you connect your own scripts and agents so you could create really powerful custom workflows beyond keyboard shortcuts for each app. Dune is a context Aware Keypad for mac that reads which app is in the foreground and automatically changes what its 3 keys do based on what you're doing. A three-key Mac keypad that reads your active app and surfaces the right actions automatically, whether you're coding, in a meeting, or getting things done. Context Awareness: Dune detects which app is in the foreground and automatically updates what its 3 keys do in real time, so you never have to manually switch profiles or reconfigure
